headline: Financials & Energy lead as semis correct; June CPI beat reduces hike risk, but FOMC Jul 28–29 and Iran tensions keep the tape mixed.
Financials lead after historic bank earnings; semis rebound on soft CPI; XLC and Energy lag as Iran sanctions wildcard looms today.

Banks smash Q2 records (JPM, GS, MS), Energy rides the Iran/Hormuz bid — but TSMC capex shock drags semis and Health Care mixed signals make XLV the avoid; Iran re-escalation is the week's #1 tail risk.
Semis and Financials lead on CPI relief + record bank earnings; Utilities and Staples lag as Iran re-escalation threatens a re-inflation spike by month-end.
Energy (XLE/OIH) surging on Hormuz re-escalation (+14% oil in 2 days); JPM record earnings beat; XLC/XLRE remain the laggards — June CPI and Warsh testimony are the session's pivots.
